title: Slovakian Open-Faced Toast
description: A traditional Slovakian-inspired toast dish with crispy bread, tangy toppings, and a crunchy twist.

ingredients.name: Toast
ingredients.notes: preferably toasted to a golden crisp

instructions: 2. Toast the bread slices for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy.
3. Spread the Slovakian chutney or aioli on top of the toasted bread slices.
4. Top with a dollop of tangy sour cream or yogurt.
5. Sprinkle chopped fresh chives or scallions on top.
6. Serve immediately, garnished with additional chives if desired.
